jd:
We are looking for a skilled Frontend Developer to join our growing team.

Responsibilities:
- Build responsive, accessible web interfaces using React and TypeScript
- Collaborate with designers to implement pixel-perfect UI from Figma designs
- Optimize application performance using code splitting, lazy loading, and caching strategies
- Write unit and integration tests using Jest and React Testing Library
- Maintain and improve our component library built on Tailwind CSS and shadcn/ui

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience with React.js and modern JavaScript (ES6+)
- Strong proficiency in HTML5, CSS3, and Tailwind CSS
- Experience with state management (Redux Toolkit or Zustand)
- Familiarity with RESTful APIs and GraphQL
- Knowledge of Git version control and CI/CD pipelines
- Experience with Vite or Webpack build tools
- Bonus: TypeScript, Next.js, Framer Motion, WebSockets

Join us as a Backend Developer to build scalable APIs and services.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop RESTful and GraphQL APIs using Node.js and Express
- Build and maintain microservices with Docker and Kubernetes
- Optimize database queries in PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and Redis
- Implement authentication and authorization using JWT and OAuth2
- Write comprehensive unit and integration tests with Jest and Supertest
- Monitor application health and performance using Datadog and Sentry

Requirements:
- 2+ years backend development experience with Node.js or Python
- Strong knowledge of Express.js or FastAPI
- Proficiency with relational databases (PostgreSQL, MySQL) and NoSQL (MongoDB)
- Experience with caching strategies using Redis
- Familiarity with message queues (RabbitMQ, Kafka)
- Understanding of Docker, container orchestration, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP)
- Knowledge of REST API design principles and security best practices
- Bonus: Microservices architecture, Terraform, WebSockets

We're hiring a Full Stack Developer to own features end-to-end.

Responsibilities:
- Develop full-stack features using React on the frontend and Node.js/Express on the backend
- Design MongoDB schemas and optimize queries for performance at scale
- Integrate third-party APIs including Stripe, Twilio, and Google Maps
- Deploy applications on Vercel, Render, and AWS with CI/CD pipelines
- Implement real-time features using WebSockets and Socket.IO
- Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical architecture decisions

Requirements:
- 2+ years experience with MERN stack (MongoDB, Express, React, Node.js)
- Proficiency in JavaScript/TypeScript, HTML5, CSS3
- Experience with Tailwind CSS and component libraries (shadcn/ui, Material UI)
- Familiarity with Redux Toolkit or React Query for state/data management
- Knowledge of JWT authentication and session management
- Version control with Git and collaborative workflows (GitHub, GitLab)
- Bonus: Next.js, Supabase, Docker, GraphQL, Stripe integration

We are seeking a Software Architect to lead technical design and system strategy.

Responsibilities:
- Define and communicate architectural vision, patterns, and standards across engineering teams
- Design scalable, resilient microservices and event-driven architectures
- Lead architectural reviews, threat modelling, and design decision documentation (ADRs)
- Evaluate and recommend technology choices for new systems and modernisation initiatives
- Mentor senior engineers and provide technical leadership across squads
- Collaborate with product and business stakeholders to align technical strategy with roadmap

Requirements:
- 7+ years of software engineering with at least 2 years in an architecture or principal engineer role
- Deep experience designing distributed systems with high availability and horizontal scalability
- Proficiency across multiple paradigms: microservices, event-driven (Kafka/SNS), serverless
- Strong knowledge of API design (REST, GraphQL, gRPC) and integration patterns
- Experience with cloud-native architecture on AWS or GCP
- Excellent documentation and communication skills
- Bonus: Domain-Driven Design (DDD), CQRS/Event Sourcing, platform engineering leadership

We are looking for an iOS Developer to craft delightful native mobile experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Design and build advanced iOS applications using Swift and SwiftUI
- Implement clean architecture patterns (MVVM, TCA) with Combine for reactive data flows
- Integrate REST and GraphQL APIs using URLSession and Apollo iOS
- Manage local persistence with Core Data and SwiftData
- Write unit and UI tests with XCTest and snapshot testing frameworks
- Submit and manage releases on App Store Connect including TestFlight distribution

Requirements:
- 2+ years of iOS development experience
- Strong proficiency in Swift and SwiftUI (UIKit knowledge is a plus)
- Solid understanding of iOS lifecycle, memory management, and concurrency (async/await)
- Experience with CocoaPods and Swift Package Manager
- Familiarity with Firebase, Push Notifications (APNs), and in-app purchases (StoreKit 2)
- Knowledge of App Store guidelines and submission process
- Bonus: WidgetKit, ARKit, CoreML on-device inference, WatchOS

We're hiring an Android Developer to build world-class mobile apps.

Responsibilities:
- Develop and maintain Android applications in Kotlin and Java using Jetpack Compose
- Implement clean architecture patterns (MVVM, MVI) with Hilt dependency injection
- Integrate REST APIs using Retrofit and manage async operations with Kotlin Coroutines
- Implement Room database for local persistence and offline-first capabilities
- Write unit and instrumented tests with JUnit, Mockito, and Espresso
- Publish and maintain apps on Google Play Store including release management

Requirements:
- 2+ years of Android development experience
- Strong proficiency in Kotlin and familiarity with Java
- Experience with Jetpack libraries: Compose, Navigation, ViewModel, LiveData/Flow
- Knowledge of Material Design 3 guidelines
- Familiarity with Firebase (Crashlytics, Analytics, Cloud Messaging)
- Understanding of Android lifecycle, permissions, and background processing
- Experience with Google Play Billing and AdMob integration
- Bonus: KMM, Wear OS, ARCore, NFC integration

We are hiring a React Native Developer to build cross-platform mobile applications.

Responsibilities:
- Build and maintain cross-platform iOS and Android apps using React Native and Expo
- Implement navigation with React Navigation and state management with Redux Toolkit or Zustand
- Integrate native modules and third-party SDKs (Stripe, Maps, Camera, Push Notifications)
- Optimize app performance by addressing bridge bottlenecks and improving render efficiency
- Write tests using Jest and Detox for end-to-end coverage
- Manage builds and OTA updates with EAS Build and EAS Update

Requirements:
- 2+ years of React Native development experience
- Strong JavaScript/TypeScript skills and familiarity with React hooks
- Experience with Expo managed and bare workflows
- Knowledge of native Android (Kotlin) or iOS (Swift) basics for native module bridging
- Familiarity with AsyncStorage, SecureStore, and SQLite for local persistence
- Experience publishing apps to both App Store and Google Play
- Bonus: Reanimated 3, Skia, NativeWind, Firebase integration

We are seeking a DevOps Engineer to streamline our development and deployment workflows.

Responsibilities:
- Design and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions, Jenkins, or CircleCI
- Manage Kubernetes clusters and containerized workloads with Docker
- Provision and manage cloud infrastructure on AWS using Terraform and CloudFormation
- Monitor system reliability and performance with Prometheus, Grafana, and the ELK stack
- Implement security best practices including secrets management and vulnerability scanning
- Automate infrastructure provisioning and configuration with Ansible

Requirements:
- 2+ years of DevOps or SRE experience
- Strong proficiency with Docker and Kubernetes (EKS/GKE)
- Hands-on experience with AWS (EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, ECS)
- Knowledge of infrastructure-as-code with Terraform or Pulumi
- Scripting skills in Bash and Python
- Experience with monitoring and logging stacks (Prometheus, Grafana, ELK)
- Familiarity with GitOps workflows and ArgoCD
- Bonus: Istio service mesh, Helm charts, cost optimization

We are looking for a Cloud Engineer to design and operate our cloud-native infrastructure.

Responsibilities:
- Architect, deploy, and manage scalable cloud solutions on AWS and GCP
- Design multi-region high-availability architectures with automated failover
- Build serverless workflows using AWS Lambda, Step Functions, and API Gateway
- Implement cloud cost governance and rightsizing strategies
- Enforce security through IAM policies, VPC design, and compliance automation
- Collaborate with development teams to embed cloud best practices into the SDLC

Requirements:
- 3+ years of experience with AWS or GCP in production environments
- Proficiency in infrastructure-as-code using Terraform and CDK
- Strong understanding of networking: VPC, subnets, route tables, peering, VPN
- Experience with managed services: RDS, DynamoDB, S3, CloudFront, Pub/Sub
- Scripting proficiency in Python and Bash
- Relevant certifications: AWS Solutions Architect or GCP Professional Cloud Architect preferred
- Bonus: Multi-cloud strategy, FinOps practices, Kubernetes on GKE/EKS

Join us as an SRE to ensure our systems are reliable, scalable, and efficient.

Responsibilities:
- Define and track SLOs, SLIs, and error budgets across all critical services
- Build and maintain observability stacks using Prometheus, Grafana, Jaeger, and OpenTelemetry
- Lead incident response, post-mortem analysis, and blameless retrospectives
- Automate toil through runbooks, self-healing scripts, and chaos engineering
- Collaborate with engineering teams on capacity planning and production readiness reviews
- Improve deployment reliability through progressive delivery: canary, blue/green, feature flags

Requirements:
- 3+ years of SRE or senior DevOps experience
- Deep knowledge of Linux internals, networking, and distributed systems
- Experience with Kubernetes at scale and service mesh (Istio/Linkerd)
- Proficiency in Python or Go for automation and tooling
- Hands-on expertise with observability tools and alerting pipelines
- Understanding of chaos engineering tools (Chaos Monkey, Litmus)
- Bonus: On-call leadership, eBPF observability, multi-cloud reliability

We are hiring a Data Scientist to derive insights and build ML models.

Responsibilities:
- Build, train, and deploy machine learning models using scikit-learn, XGBoost, and PyTorch
- Perform exploratory data analysis and feature engineering on large datasets
- Develop ETL pipelines for data collection, cleaning, and transformation using pandas and PySpark
- Create dashboards and visualizations with Tableau, Power BI, and Matplotlib
- Collaborate with product teams to translate business problems into analytical solutions
- A/B test product features and analyze experiment results

Requirements:
- Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, or related field
- 2+ years of experience in data science or machine learning
- Proficiency in Python (pandas, NumPy, scikit-learn, PyTorch or TensorFlow)
- Strong background in statistics, probability, and linear algebra
- Experience with SQL and NoSQL databases
- Familiarity with cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker, GCP Vertex AI)
- Knowledge of NLP techniques (TF-IDF, embeddings, transformers)
- Bonus: MLOps, LLM fine-tuning, Apache Spark, Airflow

Join our AI team as an ML Engineer to productionize intelligent systems.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement ML pipelines from data ingestion to model deployment
- Fine-tune and optimize large language models (LLMs) using LoRA and PEFT techniques
- Build model serving infrastructure with FastAPI, TorchServe, and Triton Inference Server
- Implement MLOps practices using MLflow, DVC, and Weights & Biases
- Optimize model inference for latency and throughput using ONNX and TensorRT
- Collaborate with data scientists to transition research models to production

Requirements:
- 2+ years experience in ML engineering or applied research
- Strong Python skills with PyTorch and/or TensorFlow
- Experience with transformer architectures and Hugging Face ecosystem
- Knowledge of vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma)
- Familiarity with RAG pipelines and LLM orchestration (LangChain, LlamaIndex)
- Experience deploying models with Docker and Kubernetes
- Understanding of model evaluation, monitoring, and drift detection
- Bonus: CUDA optimization, distributed training, OpenAI/Anthropic API integration

We are looking for a Data Engineer to build robust data infrastructure and pipelines.

Responsibilities:
- Design, build, and maintain scalable ETL/ELT pipelines using Apache Spark, Airflow, and dbt
- Architect and manage data warehouses on Snowflake, BigQuery, or Redshift
- Build real-time streaming pipelines using Apache Kafka and Flink
- Implement data quality checks, lineage tracking, and cataloging with Great Expectations and DataHub
- Collaborate with data scientists and analysts to deliver clean, reliable datasets
- Optimize query performance and manage data partitioning strategies

Requirements:
- 2+ years of data engineering experience
- Strong SQL skills and proficiency in Python
- Hands-on experience with Airflow or Prefect for workflow orchestration
- Experience with columnar storage formats: Parquet, ORC, Delta Lake
- Knowledge of cloud data platforms (Snowflake, BigQuery, Databricks)
- Understanding of data modeling: star schema, data vault
- Bonus: Streaming architectures with Kafka/Flink, dbt advanced features, Spark optimization

We are hiring a GenAI Engineer to build next-generation AI-powered products.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement RAG pipelines using LangChain and LlamaIndex
- Integrate and fine-tune LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, Mistral, Llama) for domain-specific use cases
- Build and manage vector databases (Pinecone, Weaviate, pgvector) for semantic search
- Develop agentic workflows with tool use, function calling, and multi-agent orchestration
- Implement prompt engineering strategies: few-shot, chain-of-thought, structured outputs
- Evaluate model outputs with automated evals using RAGAS, DeepEval, and custom benchmarks

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Cohere)
- Strong Python skills and familiarity with the Hugging Face ecosystem
- Experience building RAG systems and working with embedding models
- Knowledge of vector similarity search and chunking strategies
- Understanding of LLM evaluation frameworks and hallucination mitigation
- Familiarity with FastAPI for building AI microservices
- Bonus: LLM fine-tuning with QLoRA, multimodal models, LLMOps, Guardrails AI

Join our security team as a Cybersecurity Analyst to protect our systems.

Responsibilities:
- Monitor security events and incidents using SIEM tools (Splunk, Microsoft Sentinel)
- Conduct vulnerability assessments and penetration testing using Nmap, Metasploit, and Burp Suite
- Perform threat intelligence analysis and develop detection rules
- Investigate and respond to security incidents following NIST and MITRE ATT&CK frameworks
- Implement and audit security policies, access controls, and compliance (SOC 2, ISO 27001)
- Conduct security awareness training for employees

Requirements:
- 2+ years of experience in cybersecurity, SOC, or information security
- Knowledge of networking protocols (TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP, TLS)
- Experience with SIEM platforms and log analysis
- Familiarity with penetration testing methodologies and tools
- Understanding of cloud security on AWS or Azure
- Scripting skills in Python or Bash for automation
- Relevant certifications: CompTIA Security+, CEH, or CISSP preferred
- Bonus: OSCP, cloud security certifications, malware analysis

We are looking for a Blockchain Developer to build decentralized applications and smart contracts.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop smart contracts in Solidity for EVM-compatible chains (Ethereum, Polygon, BNB Chain)
- Build and test DeFi protocols including DEX, lending, and staking mechanics
- Develop frontend dApps using React with ethers.js or wagmi and RainbowKit
- Write comprehensive smart contract tests using Hardhat and Foundry
- Conduct smart contract security audits and apply best practices to prevent exploits
- Integrate with IPFS, Chainlink oracles, and cross-chain bridges

Requirements:
- 2+ years of smart contract development experience
- Strong proficiency in Solidity and familiarity with Vyper
- Experience with development frameworks: Hardhat, Foundry, or Truffle
- Knowledge of DeFi primitives: AMMs, liquidity pools, yield farming, governance tokens
- Understanding of ERC standards: ERC-20, ERC-721, ERC-1155, ERC-4337
- Familiarity with Layer 2 solutions (Arbitrum, Optimism, zkSync)
- Bonus: zkProofs, Move language (Sui/Aptos), cross-chain interoperability (LayerZero)

We are seeking an Embedded Systems Engineer to develop firmware for IoT and edge devices.

Responsibilities:
- Design and develop firmware in C and C++ for ARM Cortex-M microcontrollers (STM32, ESP32, nRF52)
- Implement RTOS-based systems using FreeRTOS and Zephyr for real-time task management
- Develop and debug communication protocols: UART, SPI, I2C, CAN, BLE, MQTT
- Optimize firmware for power consumption in battery-constrained IoT devices
- Perform hardware bring-up, board validation, and debugging with oscilloscopes and logic analyzers
- Collaborate with hardware engineers on schematic reviews and PCB design feedback

Requirements:
- 3+ years of embedded firmware development experience
- Strong C/C++ skills with deep understanding of memory management and pointers
- Experience with ARM Cortex-M architecture and bare-metal programming
- Proficiency with JTAG/SWD debugging tools and GDB
- Knowledge of wireless protocols: BLE 5.x, Wi-Fi, LoRaWAN, Zigbee
- Familiarity with CI/CD for embedded systems (Unity, CMock, Jenkins)
- Bonus: Linux BSP development, Yocto, AUTOSAR, edge ML with TensorFlow Lite

We're looking for a Product Manager to drive product vision and execution.

Responsibilities:
- Define and own the product roadmap aligned with business objectives and user needs
- Write detailed PRDs, user stories, and acceptance criteria for engineering teams
- Conduct user research, usability testing, and competitive analysis
- Collaborate cross-functionally with engineering, design, marketing, and sales
- Define KPIs and success metrics; analyze product performance with Mixpanel and Amplitude
- Manage the product backlog and run agile sprint ceremonies in Jira

Requirements:
- 3+ years of product management experience in a B2B or B2C SaaS environment
- Demonstrated ability to ship products end-to-end from ideation to launch
- Strong analytical skills with SQL and BI tools (Looker, Tableau)
- Experience with agile/scrum methodologies
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills
- Ability to prioritize ruthlessly in ambiguous, fast-moving environments
- Familiarity with UX principles and working with Figma
- Bonus: Technical background, growth product experience, AI/ML product exposure

We are hiring a Technical Program Manager to coordinate complex engineering programs.

Responsibilities:
- Lead end-to-end planning, execution, and delivery of large-scale cross-functional engineering programs
- Define project scope, milestones, and success metrics in collaboration with engineering leads
- Identify and proactively manage risks, dependencies, and blockers across multiple teams
- Drive alignment through structured communication: status reports, OKR tracking, and executive readouts
- Facilitate agile ceremonies and maintain program-level roadmaps in Jira and Confluence
- Partner with product, design, and QA to ensure on-time, high-quality releases

Requirements:
- 4+ years of technical program or project management experience at a software company
- Strong understanding of SDLC and engineering processes
- Proficiency with project management tools: Jira, Asana, Linear, or similar
- Experience managing programs spanning multiple engineering teams
- Excellent written and verbal communication for both technical and executive audiences
- PMP or Agile/Scrum certifications preferred
- Bonus: Prior software engineering background, experience with OKR frameworks

We are searching for a UI/UX Designer to create exceptional user experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Design intuitive, accessible user interfaces for web and mobile applications
- Conduct user research, create personas, and map user journeys
- Produce wireframes, prototypes, and high-fidelity mockups in Figma
- Build and maintain a scalable design system with reusable components
- Conduct usability testing and iterate based on user feedback and data
- Collaborate closely with frontend developers to ensure design fidelity

Requirements:
- 2+ years of UI/UX design experience for digital products
- Expert proficiency in Figma including auto-layout, components, and variables
- Strong portfolio demonstrating end-to-end design process
- Understanding of interaction design principles and accessibility (WCAG 2.1)
- Experience with user research methods (interviews, surveys, card sorting)
- Knowledge of design handoff workflows and developer collaboration
- Familiarity with motion design (Lottie, Framer)
- Bonus: HTML/CSS knowledge, Framer prototyping, design tokens

We are looking for a Motion Designer to bring our brand and product to life through animation.

Responsibilities:
- Create motion graphics, animated explainers, and product demo videos for marketing and onboarding
- Design micro-interactions and UI animations for web and mobile using Lottie and CSS/SVG
- Collaborate with brand, product, and marketing teams to maintain visual consistency in motion
- Produce storyboards, animatics, and final deliverables for social media and digital campaigns
- Export optimized Lottie JSON files and handoff animation specs to frontend developers

Requirements:
- 2+ years of motion design or animation experience
- Expert proficiency in After Effects and familiarity with Premiere Pro
- Experience with LottieFiles for web and mobile animation export
- Strong understanding of animation principles: easing, timing, anticipation, follow-through
- Proficiency in Figma and knowledge of how motion fits into design systems
- Portfolio demonstrating a range of motion styles: UI, explainer, brand
- Bonus: 3D motion with Cinema 4D or Blender, Rive interactive animations, Framer

We are hiring a QA Engineer to ensure the quality and reliability of our software products.

Responsibilities:
- Design, implement, and maintain automated test suites for web and API layers using Playwright and Cypress
- Develop API test automation using Postman, REST Assured, or pytest
- Build and maintain CI/CD-integrated test pipelines in GitHub Actions or Jenkins
- Perform exploratory, regression, performance, and security testing
- Collaborate with developers to define acceptance criteria and shift quality left
- Maintain test plans, defect reports, and quality metrics dashboards

Requirements:
- 2+ years of QA engineering or SDET experience
- Strong experience with test automation frameworks: Playwright, Selenium, or Cypress
- Proficiency in Python or JavaScript for test scripting
- Experience with API testing tools (Postman, REST Assured)
- Familiarity with performance testing tools: k6, JMeter, or Locust
- Knowledge of BDD methodologies with Cucumber or Behave
- Understanding of CI/CD pipelines and test reporting
- Bonus: Mobile automation with Appium, contract testing with Pact, chaos testing

We are looking for a Game Developer to create engaging gameplay experiences.

Responsibilities:
- Design and implement gameplay systems, mechanics, and AI behaviours in Unity or Unreal Engine
- Write clean, efficient C# (Unity) or C++ (Unreal) code following established architectural patterns
- Collaborate with artists and designers to integrate assets and bring game vision to life
- Optimise game performance for target platforms (PC, console, mobile) including draw calls and memory
- Implement multiplayer networking using Photon, Mirror, or Unreal's NetCode
- Write unit tests for game logic and participate in playtesting and iteration cycles

Requirements:
- 2+ years of game development experience with Unity or Unreal Engine
- Strong C# or C++ skills with a solid grasp of OOP and game architecture patterns
- Experience with physics engines, animation state machines, and particle systems
- Knowledge of shader programming (HLSL/GLSL) and basic rendering pipelines
- Familiarity with version control for game projects (Git LFS, Perforce)
- Experience shipping at least one title to a major platform
- Bonus: Procedural generation, VR/AR development, mobile F2P monetisation, DOTS/ECS

We are looking for a Business Analyst to bridge the gap between business needs and technical solutions.

Responsibilities:
- Elicit, document, and validate business requirements through stakeholder interviews and workshops
- Produce BRDs, FRDs, process flow diagrams, and use case documentation
- Analyse business processes and identify opportunities for automation or improvement
- Collaborate with product and engineering teams to translate requirements into user stories
- Track project progress, manage change requests, and perform UAT coordination
- Build dashboards and reports using Power BI, Tableau, or Excel for stakeholder reporting

Requirements:
- 2+ years of business analysis experience in IT or software projects
- Proficiency in requirements documentation using tools like Confluence and Jira
- Strong SQL skills for data analysis and validation
- Experience with process modelling: BPMN, UML, or flowcharts
- Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
- Familiarity with agile and waterfall delivery methodologies
- Bonus: Lean Six Sigma, experience in fintech or healthcare domains, Salesforce CRM knowledge

We are hiring a Technical Writer to create clear, developer-focused documentation.

Responsibilities:
- Write and maintain developer documentation including API references, SDK guides, and integration tutorials
- Create onboarding guides, changelogs, and conceptual overviews for developer-facing products
- Work with engineering and product teams to gather technical information and validate accuracy
- Structure documentation in developer portals using tools like Docusaurus, ReadMe, or Mintlify
- Write and test code samples in Python, JavaScript, or cURL to accompany API documentation
- Gather feedback from developers to continuously improve documentation quality

Requirements:
- 2+ years of technical writing experience, preferably for developer tools or SaaS products
- Ability to read and understand code in at least one programming language
- Strong command of English and experience with docs-as-code workflows (Markdown, Git)
- Familiarity with OpenAPI/Swagger specs for REST API documentation
- Experience with documentation platforms: Confluence, Notion, Docusaurus, or GitBook
- Understanding of information architecture and content design principles
- Bonus: Background as a software developer, experience with GraphQL or gRPC documentation
